title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you got so many! As many as I could on a good day... or even more!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmph. You know, you're pretty good!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna have to give it a shot too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll get so many plushies your room'll be drowning
in them!
